stemHtml: Which of the following is true according to the relevant regulations for turbo propeller powered aeroplanes not performing a steep approach?

options.a: Maximum Landing Distance at the destination aerodrome and at any alternate aerodrome is 0.7 x LDA (Landing Distance Available).
options.b: Maximum use of clearway is 1.5 x runway.
options.c: Maximum Landing Distance at destination is 0.95 x LDA (Landing Distance Available).
options.d: Maximum Take-off Run is 0.5 x runway.
